mapper.insert: insert into tb_leave_approval(title, start_time, end_time, reason, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user, status, type_id) values (#{param.title}, #{param.startTime}, #{param.endTime}, #{param.reason}, #{param.createTime}, #{param.updateTime}, #{param.createUser},#{param.updateUser}, #{param.status}, #{param.typeId})
